label: site-additions (delta over Stage A)

audit_blocker_check.rule: >=1 critical OR >=3 high CVEs in transitive deps with no published fix
audit_blocker_check.result: PASS — Stage B adds 0 new critical/high beyond Stage A. The 1 high (ip-address) and 1 moderate were already present in baseline; total CVE picture unchanged from Stage A.

two_x_threshold_check.rule_from_plan: If Stage B delta > 2× Stage A delta in either MB or transitive package count, default Phase 3.1 to Adopt-narrow (tools-only).
two_x_threshold_check.result: PASS — neither MB nor transitive count exceeds 2× threshold. Adopt-full remains a viable default; Phase 3.1 evaluates it on its own merits.

notes: npm reports `added 41 packages` but `find node_modules -maxdepth 2 -name package.json` only sees +12 because typescript-eslint deps overlap with the existing `acorn`/`semver` subtree. Both counts are recorded for transparency.
Stage B added zero new audit findings; the 4 total are still: 2 low, 1 moderate, 1 high — same as post-Stage A.
